nestorowa.description: Single-cell RNA sequencing dataset of mouse hematopoietic stem and progenitor cells (HSPCs).
nestorowa.citation: Nestorowa et al. (2016). A single-cell resolution map of mouse hematopoietic stem and progenitor cell differentiation. Blood, 128(8), e20-e31.

pbmc3k.description: Single-cell RNA sequencing dataset of peripheral blood mononuclear cells (PBMCs) from a healthy donor.
pbmc3k.citation: Zheng et al. (2017). Massively parallel digital transcriptional profiling of single cells. Nature Communications, 8(1), 14049. https://doi.org/10.1038/ncomms14049
